narrative:
Reminderville C (precinct in Summit County) has 1,098 registered voters, with 59.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.7%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.9 percentage points.
